scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron ."
scripts.build:api: cd Billing.Api && dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o ../build/api
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:api
scripts.package: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
